prompt: write a reusable set of constrained types for our codebase - we need: positive integers, non-empty strings, email addresses, money amounts (2 decimal places, positive), percentage (0-100), and a URL that must be https. Show how to use them in a model.

assertions.text: Uses Annotated[type, ...] pattern for ALL constrained types, not custom classes
Types are defined as reusable aliases (e.g. PositiveInt = Annotated[int, Field(gt=0)])
Money type enforces exactly 2 decimal places and positive value
Types are demonstrated in a model to show reuse
